{"credits": [{"type": "reporter", "user": {"avatar_url": "https://avatars.githubusercontent.com/u/2203121?v=4", "events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/Dreamsorcerer/events{/privacy}", "followers_url": "https://api.github.com/users/Dreamsorcerer/followers", "following_url": "https://api.github.com/users/Dreamsorcerer/following{/other_user}", "gists_url": "https://api.github.com/users/Dreamsorcerer/gists{/gist_id}", "gravatar_id": "", "html_url": "https://github.com/Dreamsorcerer", "id": 2203121, "login": "Dreamsorcerer", "node_id": "MDQ6VXNlcjIyMDMxMjE=", "organizations_url": "https://api.github.com/users/Dreamsorcerer/orgs", "received_events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/Dreamsorcerer/received_events", "repos_url": "https://api.github.com/users/Dreamsorcerer/repos", "site_admin": false, "starred_url": "https://api.github.com/users/Dreamsorcerer/starred{/owner}{/repo}", "subscriptions_url": "https://api.github.com/users/Dreamsorcerer/subscriptions", "type": "User", "url": "https://api.github.com/users/Dreamsorcerer", "user_view_type": "public"}}], "cve_id": "CVE-2026-47265", "cvss": {"score": null, "vector_string": null}, "cvss_severities": {"cvss_v3": {"score": 0.0, "vector_string": null}, "cvss_v4": {"score": 6.6, "vector_string": "CVSS:4.0/AV:N/AC:L/AT:N/PR:N/UI:N/VC:H/VI:N/VA:N/SC:N/SI:N/SA:N/E:U"}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-346", "name": "Origin Validation Error"}], "description": "### Summary

Cookies set with the `cookies` parameter on requests are sent after following a cross-origin redirect.

### Impact

If a developer uses the `cookies` parameter on a per-request basis then sensitive data might be leaked to an attacker if they manage to control a redirect.

### Workaround

If unable to upgrade, using a `Cookie` header in the `headers` parameter is not vulnerable.

-----

title: AIOHTTP is vulnerable to cross-origin redirect with per-request cookies
